description: CompositionWhite sleeveless printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with a square neck, has a pintuck bib, A-line waist and split sides at the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed white kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in this A-line waist, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
